Hero.description: We supply the beams your project needs. Directly from manufacturing to your site.

AboutUs.description1: At StructoViga, we specialize in distributing high-strength steel solutions for infrastructure and building projects.
AboutUs.description2: Our focus is the precise delivery of essential components:

OurProducts.subtitle: Steel solutions manufactured for high-demand projects.

items.title: Long-Span Trusses
items.description: Customizable structures designed to optimize strength-to-weight ratio, allowing for wide spans with minimized weight.

items.title: Lattice Columns or Pillars
items.description: Vertical elements with high structural capacity and open-web design, ideal for supporting heavy loads with great torsional rigidity.

items.title: Long-Span Walkways
items.description: Pedestrian bridges designed for spans above average, lightweight yet extremely robust for industrial traffic.

items.title: Long-Span Trusses
items.description: Implementation in logistics centers and industrial warehouses, providing column-free spans to optimize maneuvering and storage areas.

items.title: High-Load Supports
items.description: Lattice columns designed to withstand critical winds on highways and support elevated tanks with a minimal foundation footprint.

items.title: Elevated Connections
items.description: Industrial walkways for the safe passage of personnel between warehouses and access to process machinery without interrupting plant operations.

Contact.description: Steel structures manufactured in El Salvador for El Salvador and Central America. Contact us for quotes on long-span trusses, beams, and open-web joists.
Contact.ctaDescription: Write to our email or call us directly to start your estimate.

Footer.description: Steel structures: Long-span trusses, beams, and open-web joists. Made in El Salvador for El Salvador and Central America.
